/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/runtime_unit_tests.dir/unit/test_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_unit_tests.dir/unit/test_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_unit_tests.dir/unit/test_memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_unit_tests.dir/unit/test_object_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_unit_tests.dir/unit/test_sanity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/runtime_unit_tests.dir/unit/test_scheduler.cpp.o -o runtime_unit_tests  /usr/local/lib/libgtest_main.a ../libruntime_net.a ../libruntime_task.a /usr/local/lib/libgtest.a ../libruntime_foundation.a
